title: No Rain & Particles
description: This resource pack removes rain visuals and completely mutes the rain sound.
body:
This resource pack removes **rain visuals** and completely mutes the rain sound.

![res](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xJHT56Qp/images/16a37b073a7dc21bc3855adb682440bf2c7843ed.png)

It is designed to improve performance and create a clearer, distraction-free environment.

No gameplay mechanics are changed, only visuals and audio are affected.
Compatible with modern Minecraft Java versions.
